code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
  let n = tokens.len()
  mut out = ""
  mut i = 0
  mut current_max = 0
  while i < n
    let tok = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    let v = match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if i == 0
      current_max = v
    else if v > current_max
      current_max = v
    end
    if i == 0
      out = "#{current_max}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{current_max}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
